title: Energy inflation in the shadow of US–China tensions: Is the energy transition a pathway to stability?
abstract: Investigates the influence of US-China tensions and energy transition on energy inflation using MMQR for 33 countries (1995-2023). Results show US-China tensions increase energy inflation across all quantiles, while energy transition mitigates it at lower and medium levels. Technology advancement and globalization reduce energy inflation across all quantiles.
notes: 核心方法: MMQR (Method of Moments Quantile Regression)
自變數：US-China Tensions, Energy Transition, EG, FD, TD, UP, GLOB
美中緊張在全部quantile都顯著推升能源通膨
能源轉型在低至中quantile顯著抑制通膨
技術發展與全球化在所有quantile都降低能源成本
